## Goal

What should RepoMori help you do?

## Use Case

Describe the repo, agent, or local workflow this would improve.

## Suggested Shape

CLI/API idea, output format, or behavior you have in mind.

## Constraints

Any local-only, dependency, privacy, or licensing constraints?
